expectations.text: Error toast rewrite states what specifically failed (mentions deploy/deployment) and a next step (logs, retry, etc.)
expectations.evidence: 'Deploy failed. Check the logs for details.' — names the failure (Deploy) and the next step (Check the logs).

expectations.text: Form label is rewritten in sentence case (not ALL CAPS, not Title Case)
Destructive confirm button names the destructive action (contains the word Delete and the object Database, or Delete <object>)
Modal title names the action being configured (mentions autoscaling, not just 'Settings')
Empty state rewrite is specific to services (mentions services or No services yet) — not generic 'No data'
expectations.evidence: 'No services yet. Create a service to deploy your first app.'

expectations.text: Output is a Before / After / Why markdown table covering all 5 strings
expectations.evidence: Markdown table with Before | After | Why columns; 5 rows covering all 5 strings.
